name: noimgur
description: Redirects imgur.com to rimgo proxy instances for users in blocked regions

scripts.sign:firefox: dotenv -- sh -c 'wxt build -b firefox && git archive --format=zip HEAD -o .output/source.zip && web-ext sign --source-dir .output/firefox-mv2 --artifacts-dir .output/web-ext-artifacts --channel=unlisted --api-key=$AMO_KEY --api-secret=$AMO_SECRET --upload-source-code=.output/source.zip'
